title: Poop Emoji: Copy & Paste 💩 Funny Combos
meta_description: The poop emoji 💩 with toilets, stink clouds, gross-out faces, and funny meme combos for jokes, pranks, and silly group chats. Click any symbol to copy it instantly.
hero_tagline: The smiling pile of poo 💩 and every toilet, stink cloud, and gross-out face that belongs beside it. Click any symbol or combo to copy it instantly.
intro: The poop emoji 💩 — officially Pile of Poo — has been the internet's favorite piece of toilet humor since the early emoji days, complete with its trademark friendly smile. It headlines prank texts, birthday roasts, dog-walk updates, and group-chat chaos everywhere. This page collects the poop emoji with its bathroom supporting cast, the funniest reaction faces to pair it with, and one-click combo sets for maximum comedic effect.
